DISCOVERY 301, DEFENDANT CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO CHASE REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE IS GRANTED. IF HE HAS NOT ALREADY DONE SO, PLAINTIFF MUST RESPOND AND PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS BY 6/9/11, AND HE MUST PAY DEFENDANT SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $415.00. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED (301/PJB)
